title: PostBin node returns 404 error
symptom: The PostBin node fails with a 404 error when trying to create a bin, indicating that it cannot find the requested resource.
applies_when: Attempting to create a new bin
not_this_if: Bin ID is already provided in the node settings
root_cause: The PostBin node requires a valid Bin ID to function correctly. If the node is not provided with a valid ID, it cannot create a new bin and will return a 404 error.
fix_steps: Go to https://postb.in and manually create a bin.
Copy the Bin ID from the URL after creation.
Paste the Bin ID into the Bin ID field in the PostBin node settings.
Save the workflow and try executing it again.
agent_instruction: Manually create a bin on PostBin and update the node settings with the new Bin ID.
